expect.note: Repo has ~100 real *Test.java files under gson/src/test/java (e.g. GsonTest, JsonReaderTest, functional/*Test). With gazelle:java_test_mode suite these become java_test targets. Asserting >=1 is conservative since exact target count depends on suite-mode grouping; the integration test OSGiManifestIT and metrics/PerformanceTest may be excluded or fail at runtime.

Tier-4 runs the repo's own JUnit/Truth tests. Marked allow_nonzero because several real tests carry runtime/environment hazards noted in the approach: OSGiManifestIT needs an OSGi runtime, PerformanceTest (metrics) may be slow/flaky, Java17RecordTest/Java17ReflectionHelperTest require JDK17 features under a JDK11 toolchain, and GsonBuildConfigTest depends on the java-templates-generated GsonBuildConfig.java. A clean exit 0 is the goal; a nonzero here is recorded but does not invalidate the honest tier-2/3 result. Predicted realistic ceiling is tier 2.
